title: mimulus tenellus var. maior
intro: Mimulus tenellus var. maior, also known as greater monkey flower, is a variety of flowering plant native to the western United States and Canada. It is a member of the Phrymaceae family and is valued for its medicinal and health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including anxiety, insomnia, and skin irritations, due to its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties. Mimulus tenellus var. maior can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
